news.headline: Cemtrex's Vicon partners with Hailo to integrate Hailo-15 SoC into NEXT Modular Camera System, raising video intelligence bar.
news.summary: In Hauppauge, NY on Dec. 12, 2024, Cemtrex Inc. (NASDAQ: CETX, CETXP) revealed that its subsidiary, Vicon Industries, Inc., has formed a partnership with Hailo, an AI chip manufacturer recognized for its high-performance edge AI processors. This collaboration aims to enhance video intelligence by incorporating the innovative Hailo-15 System-on-a-Chip (SoC) into Vicon’s NEXT Modular Camera System. This move is set to push the boundaries of security technology and industrial services, with the joint venture positioning Vicon at the forefront of cutting-edge AI technology integration.

news.headline: Fluence Gridstack Pro 2000 exceeds safety standards for energy storage with deflagration testing by Fluence and DNV, along with large-scale fire testing by Fluence and CSA Group, confirming it as the first domestic content solution to surpass industry safety standards.
news.summary: Testing conducted by Fluence and DNV revealed that Gridstack Pro 2000, incorporating U.S.-manufactured battery modules, surpassed industry safety standards. Additionally, large-scale fire testing conducted by Fluence and CSA Group further confirmed the product's safety. This marks Gridstack Pro 2000 as the initial domestic content solution to exceed the top safety standards in the industry.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: Protectionism is short term inflationary.
Coinbase plans to remove USDT in Europe due to lack of compliance, may reconsider for MiCA-compliant stablecoins later.
news.summary: Coinbase has announced that it will review the possibility of reinstating services for stablecoins that meet MiCA compliance standards in the future.

news.headline: Charlotte's Web presents promising phase 1 results targeting Autism Spectrum Disorder at ACNP Meeting.
news.summary: Exciting discoveries were shared at the 2024 American College of Neuropsychopharmacology Annual Meeting in Louisville, Colorado. Charlotte's Web Holdings, Inc. (stock symbols TSX: CWEB, OTCQX: CWBHF), a top player in CBD hemp extract, unveiled significant findings during the event. The news was announced on December 12, 2024, showcasing the company's cutting-edge research in the field.

news.headline: Toy Story characters, including Buzz Lightyear, join Brawl Stars until Feb 5 in a holiday event.
news.summary: From today until February 5, players of the widely popular mobile game Brawl Stars will have the opportunity to play as Buzz Lightyear, a beloved character from Pixar's Toy Story franchise. This exciting inclusion brings a nostalgic touch to the game, offering fans a special experience during the holiday season. This limited-time feature is sure to thrill and engage fans of both Brawl Stars and the iconic Toy Story series.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: We have not discussed neutral rate level in meeting.
ECB's President Lagarde: The neutral rate can't be determined with precision.
Chartwells K12 reveals top 10 food trends for kids in 2025, shifting from traditional to adventurous options in cafeterias and kitchens. (Including date and location)
news.summary: In Charlotte, N.C., as of December 12, 2024, school chefs and dietitians are noticing a shift in kids' preferences when it comes to cafeteria options. Gone are the days of solely serving chicken nuggets and plain pasta. Kids today are showing a greater interest in more adventurous and diverse food choices on their plates.This shift reflects a growing trend in catering to the evolving tastes of young diners.

news.headline: SSP International marks 66th anniversary, increases placements for first-gen students, opens 2025 program applications.
news.summary: In an effort to assist more first-generation students, SSP International (SSPI), a nonprofit celebrating its 66th year, is expanding its impact by boosting the number of placements. This initiative aims to support a larger number of individuals seeking educational opportunities.

news.headline: Eva NYC revamps brand, enhancing packaging & products. Offers quality at low prices. Based in Brooklyn. (111)
news.summary: In Brooklyn, Eva NYC has unveiled new packaging and groundbreaking product offerings to provide high-quality hair solutions at affordable prices. Renowned for their dedication to research and innovation, Eva NYC continues to lead in the hair industry. As of December 12, 2024, the brand is setting new standards with their updated approach.

news.headline: Trump: We're getting corporate taxes down to 15%.
Notification from director/PDMR regarding insider dealings.
NATO Chief Rutte: It is time to shift to a wartime mindset.
Lunit study shows AI model for immunohistochemistry images analysis, with multi-cohort training approach, highlighting accurate results.
news.summary: A recent study published in npj Precision Oncology from SEOUL, South Korea on December 12, 2024, showcased the success of a multi-cohort training approach in accurately analyzing previously unseen immunohistochemistry data. Lunit, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven tools for cancer diagnostics listed as KRX:328130.KQ, played a significant role in this research. The findings emphasize the importance of innovative methods in handling cancer data, underscoring the potential for advancements in the field.

news.headline: KYOCERA AVX released industry's highest power 0603 resistor, the new CR Series, for high-reliability performance in various applications.
news.summary: Introducing the latest CR Series high-power chip resistor, boasting non-magnetic properties and meeting MIL-PRF-55342 standards. This innovative resistor is engineered to provide exceptional reliability in a range of industries including communications, instrumentation, test and measurement, as well as military and defense sectors. This groundbreaking product was unveiled in Fountain Inn, South Carolina on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: Private sector leads in 63% of Chief AI Officer appointments per Altrata study. AI influences corporate talent strategy.
news.summary: A recent report by Altrata delves into the background and attributes of the Chief AI Officer role. The study, titled 2024 Executive Insight: Chief AI Officers, was published today by Altrata in New York City. Altrata is known for its expertise in analyzing the affluent and influential.

news.headline: Equity increase and new total voting rights disclosed, enhancing shareholder participation.
NATO Chief Rutte: We are not ready for what is coming in 4-5 years.
ECB's President Lagarde: I don't think about market pricing of rate hikes.
Thompson Coe expands, opens Colorado office after 70+ years of legal services. Firm has 9 locations.
news.summary: Thompson, Coe, Cousins & Irons, LLP, a leading litigation firm with over 70 years of experience in providing legal services, has expanded its reach by opening an office in Denver, Colorado. This new location adds to the firm's existing network of eight offices, allowing them to serve clients both regionally and nationally. The announcement was made on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: ClearBlade introduces new anomaly detection AI component for assets maintenance. AUSTIN, Texas, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on December 12, 2024, ClearBlade announced the availability of anomaly detection AI for customers. This technology allows operators to promptly respond to assets in need of maintenance or attention. ClearBlade, renowned for its Edge AI, IoT, and connected digital twins software, is offering this innovative solution to help businesses enhance efficiency and productivity.

news.headline: Cygna Labs releases VitalQIP 24 to manage DDI across networks, data centers, and cloud deployments. Company announcement on Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: Cygna Labs has rolled out an enhancement release that empowers customers to seamlessly oversee DDI throughout enterprise networks, data centers, and multi-cloud setups. The Miami-based software developer, known for its specialization in this area, aims to equip enterprises globally with tools for comprehensive management. The release, announced on December 12, 2024, marks a significant development for Cygna Labs as it continues to cater to the evolving needs of businesses in the digital era.

news.headline: Packline Materials Handling and Ultrasource LLC introduce new stainless twin spindle attachment with side shift for precision positioning rolls of foil and film.
news.summary: Packline Materials Handling and Ultrasource LLC have introduced a new stainless lifter and twin spindle attachment featuring a side-shift mechanism. This innovative equipment is specifically designed to efficiently position rolls of film and foil onto the processing or packaging line with precision. The lifter and attachment are constructed from durable stainless steel, ensuring longevity and reliability in the handling process.

news.headline: SEBERS Medical introduces First-Time Buyer Program for Blossom TMS Machines at $49,500 (discount of $13,000) with priority support upgrade.
news.summary: SEBERS Medical has introduced an exclusive offer for first-time buyers, unveiling the Blossom TMS Therapy System at a discounted rate of $49,500, marking a significant $13,000 reduction from its original price. Additionally, purchasers will receive a complimentary upgrade to Blossom Concierge Direct, ensuring priority-level support. The program was announced in Philadelphia on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: Green Cubes Technology introduces Battery Retrofit Kit for OneCharge Batteries, a tailored solution for flat style E-box.
news.summary: Green Cubes Technology, a renowned company in material handling battery solutions, has revealed the release of a new Battery Retrofit Kit designed for OneCharge Batteries. This cutting-edge product provides a convenient drop-in solution customized for OneCharge's "flat style" E-box. The Battery Retrofit Kit aims to streamline the battery replacement process and enhance efficiency.

news.headline: CreatorIQ generated 486.6 billion brand impressions in 2024, 184% higher than the previous year. Platform earned 310% revenue growth from 2020-2023.
news.summary: CreatorIQ has experienced significant growth to keep up with the increasing demand in the industry. With a 310% increase in revenue from 2020 to 2023, the platform has announced major updates to meet the needs of creators and marketers. This comes during a period of record-breaking content creation and impact. Los Angeles, Dec. 12, 2024.

news.headline: General Mills launches Cheerios Protein with 8 grams per serving to meet consumer demand for protein options.
news.summary: Cheerios, a well-known cereal brand, is launching a new product called Cheerios Protein in response to consumer demand for more protein options. This new addition to the Cheerios lineup contains 8 grams of protein per serving. With a significant 71% of consumers actively seeking to incorporate more protein into their diets, General Mills is excited to introduce this flavorful and protein-rich cereal. This expansion reflects the company's commitment to meeting the evolving preferences of consumers and catering to the growing interest in protein-rich food choices.

news.headline: Foxit's eSign and PDF platform helps Xseed Solutions streamline and grow, creating, editing, sharing, storing in a secure environment.
news.summary: A prominent software development company in Fremont, California, has recently enhanced its capabilities to generate, modify, distribute, and archive documents within a consolidated, safeguarded, and efficient workflow setting. This company, Foxit, renowned for its cutting-edge PDF and eSignature solutions, has made significant strides in this area. The development was reported on December 12, 2024, indicating Foxit's ongoing commitment to delivering high-quality technology services.

news.headline: FoodPRO in Frederick leases 20,000 sq ft at 605 Church St for expansion to mark its 90th anniversary in 2025.
news.summary: FoodPRO Corp, an integral part of Frederick's business landscape since 1935, is excited to celebrate its 90th anniversary in 2025. The company recently secured an extra 20,000 square feet of warehouse space located at 605 Church Street in Frederick, Maryland. This expansion is part of FoodPRO's growth strategy as it continues to serve the community.

news.headline: Quintana Roo Tourism Council launches 'Luxury Experience' campaign in Mexican Caribbean, promoting premier travel offerings.
news.summary: Luxury seekers can indulge in a variety of upscale accommodations and experiences in the region, whether it be at five-star resorts, private yachts, secluded bungalows, or cultural immersion activities. In Cancún, Mexico, on December 12, 2024, the Quintana Roo Tourism Promotion Council (CPTQ) introduced their latest initiative. This initiative promotes the diverse luxury offerings in the region and aims to cater to the individual preferences of all travelers. Whether one seeks lavish amenities or authentic cultural experiences, the region boasts options to fulfill every visitor's desires.

news.headline: SolasAI named Cool Vendor by Gartner for AI in banking. Recognized for innovative AI lending solution. Philadelphia, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: A company specializing in fair and responsible AI was recently honored for their innovative work in AI, particularly for their lending services solution. The company, SolasAI, based in Philadelphia, received recognition for their advancements in AI technology. This acknowledgment comes as part of a select group of companies known for their contributions to AI innovation and transformation. The news was made public on December 12, 2024, via PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.headline: Dealer eProcess (DEP) introduces Sherpa AI to BMW dealers for customized customer experience. Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: DEP is pleased to reveal the expansion of its revolutionary Sherpa AI service to BMW dealers, providing a unique solution that offers tailored content and promotions to improve customer satisfaction. This announcement was made on December 12, 2024, in LISLE, Illinois.

news.headline: Researchers present findings on equitable food access at ASSA meeting in San Francisco. Jan. 4, 2025 at 8am - 10am.
news.summary: Members of AAEA will be showcasing their research at the ASSA 2025 Annual Meeting in San Francisco, CA, on January 4, 2025, from 8:00 am to 10:00 am (PST) at the Hilton San Francisco Union Square. This is an opportunity for media personnel to attend and learn about the latest research findings.

news.headline: NFP hires Sean Devlin to lead ICOLI business, brings expertise in client management. Decades of experience in insurance field.
news.summary: With decades of experience in insurance company-owned life insurance and client relationship management, Devlin joins NFP in New York on December 12, 2024. NFP, now an Aon company, is a prominent property and casualty broker, benefits consultant, wealth manager, and retirement plan advisor. This move underscores NFP's commitment to enhancing its expertise and services in the industry.

news.headline: New AGON Pro AG326UD Gaming Monitor boasts 32" UHD QD-OLED display with 3840x2160 resolution, 165Hz refresh rate, and 0.03ms GtG response time.
news.summary: The innovative AGON Pro AG326UD Gaming Monitor has raised the bar with its state-of-the-art 32-inch UHD QD-OLED screen, delivering an impressive 3840x2160 4K resolution. Boasting a rapid 165Hz refresh rate and an incredibly responsive 0.03ms GtG response time, this monitor offers unparalleled performance. The product was unveiled in Los Angeles on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: North Carolina Community College System picks Violet PR to promote economic development division's initiatives. MONTCLAIR, N.J., Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: A public relations firm named Violet PR, located in Montclair, New Jersey, has been selected by an organization to showcase the initiatives of its economic development division. Highlights will include the NCEdge customized training program. The announcement was made in Montclair, N.J. on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: Veteran Peter Wang launches Skyseed - 1st Fund & Incubator for Bluesky. $1M starting fund, already vetting submissions. AUSTIN, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: With an initial capital of $1 million, the Skyseed Fund has begun reviewing its first submissions in Austin, Texas. Founded by open-source industry veteran Peter Wang, this venture fund and incubator is dedicated to Bluesky and its open ecosystem. The launch took place on December 12, 2024, marking a significant milestone in supporting innovation in this niche.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: Productivity is more promising.

China's Central Economic Work Conference: Currently, domestic demand is insufficient, some firms face difficulties in production and operation, people's employment and income growth face pressures - Xinhua.
ECB's President Lagarde: Risk to inflation is now two sided.
NATO Chief Rutte: We need to be clear-eyed about China's ambitions.
Pearson's Connections Academy partners with CAPS Network to offer profession-based learning, benefitting high school students nationwide. (Characters: 104)
news.summary: Pearson's Connections Academy, a prominent provider of tuition-free online public school programs for K-12 students, has announced a pioneering collaboration with CAPS Network. This partnership marks the first virtual school initiative within the CAPS Network, benefiting students across the nation. The partnership was unveiled on December 12, 2024, in Hoboken, New Jersey. Pearson's Connections Academy, operating under the FTSE symbol PSON.L, is known for its high-quality educational offerings. This collaboration is expected to have a significant impact on the education sector, with a notable emphasis on virtual learning.

news.headline: Rentec Direct celebrates 6th year of Angel Tree Program, benefiting local children in need during holidays.
news.summary: Rentec Direct celebrated six years of supporting the Salvation Army's Angel Tree Program, spreading joy to disadvantaged children in the community. The company, based in Grants Pass, Oregon, has been a key player in property management software. This initiative, which took place on December 12, 2024, showcases Rentec Direct's commitment to giving back to those in need.

news.headline: Zefiro Methane Corp. SVP leading webinar on Carbon Avoidance Credits in Oil and Gas Well Plugging at Penn State Univ.
news.summary: A webinar titled "Carbon Avoidance Credits in Oil and Gas Well Plugging" will focus on Zefiro's initiative to produce premium carbon offset products through orphaned well plugging activities across the country.

news.headline: BuzzFeed sells First We Feast to Soros Fund Management affiliate for $82.5 million in all-cash deal, clearing remaining debt.
news.summary: In New York, BuzzFeed, Inc. (Nasdaq: BZFD) confirmed the completion of the sale of First We Feast to a group headed by an affiliate of Soros Fund Management LLC for a total of $82.5 million in cash. With this recent deal, along with a portion of the Company's convertible notes being prepaid, BuzzFeed now boasts a cash balance surpassing its remaining debt. Further details can be found in the Company's 8-K filing with the SEC dated December 12, 2024.

news.headline: DAT 2025 Freight Focus Report predicts higher truckload rates in 2025 due to tightening capacity, bringing uncertainty for shippers.
news.summary: In Beaverton, Oregon, a recent report by DAT Freight & Analytics indicates that truckload transportation is poised to enter a new business cycle in 2025. This shift brings both opportunities and uncertainties for freight shippers, brokers, and carriers. Following years of volatility, businesses can expect changes in geopolitical factors, trade policies, immigration laws, consumer sentiment, automation, artificial intelligence, and available capacity in the industry. The report highlights the significant impacts of these factors on the transportation and logistics sector as we approach 2025.

news.headline: BuzzFeed sells 'Hot Ones' for $82.5M to group with host Sean Evans. Deal to pay off tens of millions in debt.
news.summary: Hosted by Sean Evans, a group that includes him and Soros Fund Management has acquired the show, leading to a significant sale for tens of millions of dollars. This sale will enable BuzzFeed to pay off a substantial amount of debt.

news.headline: AFRO News honored for second year on Inner City 100 List, recognizing fastest growing businesses in underserved areas.
news.summary: Recognizing the growth of businesses in underserved areas, the Inner City 100 Awards held in Baltimore on December 12, 2024, acknowledged the AFRO as one of the top 100 fastest-growing enterprises for the second year in a row. This prestigious honor, organized by the Initiative for a Competitive Inner City, celebrates businesses making significant strides in underserved communities.

news.headline: MedX extends Series I Loan Notes, secures $2,650,000 out of $3,700,000 for extension till December 31, 2025. Additional $300,000 sought.
news.summary: In a recent Press Release on October 22, 2024, MedX Health Corp. revealed that they have received final TSXV Acceptance for extending the Maturity Date of $2,650,000 out of $3,700,000 in outstanding Convertible Loan Notes ("Series I Notes") from December 31, 2023, to December 31, 2025. This Extension allows for the possibility of requesting further Acceptance from TSXV if more holders of Series I Notes are involved.
